name: Create Phonemic Sound Boxes Activity
description: Create a phonemic awareness 'Sound Boxes' activity in ActivInspire for a Kindergarten class. Create a new flipchart titled 'Sound Boxes' and import the image of a Cat (/home/ga/Pictures/ActivInspire/cat.jpg) with 3 square boxes below it. Also import the image of a Frog (/home/ga/Pictures/ActivInspire/frog.jpg) with 4 square boxes below it. Include at least 5 red circular chips at the bottom of the page for students to use as counters. Save the final flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/phonemic_awareness.flipchart.
